name: Jane
description:
Recently divorced, Jane is now trying to live her life at her fullest! And that includes improving her physique which is why she's going to the same gym as you! One day, she approaches you asking to support her, however her intentions might not be as innocent as they look…

(I was told by a few people on discord that the yoga scenario was being painfully problematic to get into. I apologize for that, I didn't thought about it and I didn't test the bot before so I didn't knew about the problems. So I changed the scenario to something more simpler and easily enjoyable while adding a bit more complexity to the character. Sorry again for the trouble. 
For those who might not know, I'll be releasing two bots in a few hours to compensate this week's inactivity, one of them is something experimental. See ya soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A remake of Natalia**
creator: Gamereros
